executives.name: Jean-Louis Servranckx
executives.background: Mr. Servranckx has over 35 years of experience in the construction industry, having held several key management positions at VINCI and Eiffage. He joined Aecon as President and Chief Executive Officer in September 2018.

tenure_dates.title: President, Chief Executive Officer and Director

executives.name: David Smales
executives.background: Mr. Smales joined Aecon in 2009 as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer. Prior to joining Aecon, he was the Chief Financial Officer of Catalyst Paper Corporation.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer
Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: Steve Nackan
executives.background: Mr. Nackan is Executive Vice President and President, Aecon Concessions. He joined Aecon in 2002 and has been instrumental in the development of Aecon's concessions business.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and President, Aecon Concessions
Executive Vice President and President, Aecon Concessions

executives.name: Christopher Hill
executives.background: Mr. Hill has over 30 years of experience in the mining industry, primarily in financial and corporate development roles. He was previously Treasurer of Kinross Gold Corporation.

executives.name: J.D. Hole
executives.background: Mr. Hole was the Chairman of Lockerbie & Hole Inc. prior to its acquisition by Aecon in 2009. He has extensive experience in the industrial construction sector.

executives.name: John Beck
executives.background: Mr. Beck is the Founder and Chairman of Aecon Group Inc. He has been a director of Aecon or its predecessors since 1963. He is a graduate of the University of British Columbia in Civil Engineering.

executives.name: Susan Wolburgh Jenah
executives.background: Ms. Wolburgh Jenah is the former President and CEO of the Investment Industry Regulatory Organization of Canada (IIROC). She serves on several boards and is a member of the Order of Canada.

board_of_directors.name: John Beck
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Beck is the Founder and Chairman of Aecon Group Inc. He has been a director of Aecon or its predecessors since 1963. He is a graduate of the University of British Columbia in Civil Engineering.

board_of_directors.name: Susan Wolburgh Jenah
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Wolburgh Jenah is the former President and CEO of the Investment Industry Regulatory Organization of Canada (IIROC). She serves on several boards and is a member of the Order of Canada.
